title: Marketing-sourced deals close 27% faster this week
anchor: Current week marketing wins average 38 days to close versus the prior 11-week average of 52 days.
connect: Mid-market accounts represent 7 of the 9 wins this week.
body: Current week marketing wins average 38 days to close versus the prior 11-week average of 52 days. Mid-market accounts represent 7 of the 9 wins this week.
trace: Deal velocity improvement signal from current week marketing-sourced wins showing significant compression versus trailing baseline.

title: Mid-market SQL volume up 50% in April
anchor: April mid-market SQLs hit 147 month-to-date versus the Q1 monthly average of 98.
connect: ABM acceptance rate runs at 61% compared to 42% for non-ABM leads.
body: April mid-market SQLs hit 147 month-to-date versus the Q1 monthly average of 98. ABM acceptance rate runs at 61% compared to 42% for non-ABM leads.
trace: Mid-market SQL volume surge in April with ABM showing higher SDR acceptance rates.

title: Paid social flips channel dominance in Q2
anchor: Q2 paid social generated $620K in pipeline versus $380K from paid search.
connect: Q1 ran the opposite direction with paid search at $720K and paid social at $410K.
body: Q2 paid social generated $620K in pipeline versus $380K from paid search. Q1 ran the opposite direction with paid search at $720K and paid social at $410K.
trace: Channel mix reversal between paid social and paid search from Q1 to Q2.

title: Branded search doubles over six weeks
anchor: Weekly branded search volume climbed from 1000 to 1921 with gains every week.
connect: Cumulative growth sits at 92% over the six-week window ending April 19.
body: Weekly branded search volume climbed from 1000 to 1921 with gains every week. Cumulative growth sits at 92% over the six-week window ending April 19.
trace: Six consecutive weeks of branded search growth with 92% cumulative increase.

title: Direct traffic crosses organic for first time
anchor: April traffic share shows direct at 42% and organic search at 37%.
connect: Direct first crossed organic on a cumulative basis on April 15.
body: April traffic share shows direct at 42% and organic search at 37%. Direct first crossed organic on a cumulative basis on April 15.
trace: Direct traffic overtaking organic search as primary channel for the first time on April 15.

title: Enterprise win rate jumps 8 points in Q2
anchor: Q2 enterprise deals close at 31% win rate on 26 opportunities.
connect: Trailing four quarters averaged 22% on 180 enterprise opportunities.
body: Q2 enterprise deals close at 31% win rate on 26 opportunities. Trailing four quarters averaged 22% on 180 enterprise opportunities.
trace: Enterprise win rate improvement in Q2 versus historical baseline performance.

title: Atlas leads brand mention volume by 52%
anchor: April brand mentions hit 1840 for Atlas SaaS versus 1210 for Beacon Systems.
connect: Atlas outperforms the top competitor by 630 mentions this month.
body: April brand mentions hit 1840 for Atlas SaaS versus 1210 for Beacon Systems. Atlas outperforms the top competitor by 630 mentions this month.
trace: Brand mention leadership versus primary competitor Beacon Systems in April.

title: Analyst mention pace up 50% this month
anchor: Last 14 days delivered 9 analyst mentions versus 6 in the prior 30 days.
connect: Forrester and G2 each contributed 3 mentions in the recent window.
body: Last 14 days delivered 9 analyst mentions versus 6 in the prior 30 days. Forrester and G2 each contributed 3 mentions in the recent window.
trace: Accelerating analyst mention frequency with concentration in Forrester and G2.

title: Event velocity advantage emerges in Q1
anchor: SaaS Connect and peer events closed in 46 days average versus 72 days in Q4.
connect: SaaS Connect alone contributed 12 of the 17 event-sourced wins.
body: SaaS Connect and peer events closed in 46 days average versus 72 days in Q4. SaaS Connect alone contributed 12 of the 17 event-sourced wins.
trace: Event-sourced deal acceleration in Q1 with SaaS Connect as the primary contributor.

title: Fintech dominance appears in mid-market wins
anchor: Last 60 days of mid-market wins show 8 of 12 from fintech companies.
connect: All 12 mid-market winners run Snowflake plus dbt in their stack.
body: Last 60 days of mid-market wins show 8 of 12 from fintech companies. All 12 mid-market winners run Snowflake plus dbt in their stack.
trace: Fintech vertical concentration and consistent tech stack pattern in recent mid-market wins.

connect: Campaign status shows ready across all associated launch assets.
body: Campaign calendar locks April 24 with launch scheduled for May 8. Campaign status shows ready across all associated launch assets.

body: Current week inbound capacity sits at 210 versus inbound volume of 142. Trailing four weeks averaged capacity of 206 and volume of 201.

body: Q2 digital ads actual through April 23 sits at $256K versus $340K planned. Two event line items totaling $84K provide reallocation opportunity.

body: Atlas Connect reference opt-in rate sits at 29% versus 75% for Atlas Insights. Atlas Workflow opt-ins run at 70% between the two extremes.
